instructionsHowSubtitle: Simple steps to start earning with Gridix
instructionsStep1Text: Use your referral link or add clients manually through the dashboard.
instructionsStep2Text: Get 20% from all client payments. For integrators, the commission is 40–50%.
instructionsStep3Text: Minimum withdrawal amount is $100. Payments to card or USDT.
instructionsIntegratorText: If you add clients as an integrator, you independently top up your account through the "Clients" section and pay subscriptions for them, keeping your commission immediately. You don't need to wait for payouts!
instructionsMaterial2: How to sell Gridix to developers
instructionsMaterial3: How the interactive floor plan works
instructionsVideo2: What the floor plan looks like (Demo)
instructionsAudienceExtra: All companies related to developers and real estate
instructionsDemoText: Show your client how the interactive floor plan works in real time.
instructionsFaq1Answer: Commission is credited instantly after successful payment by the client. Funds become available for withdrawal after a short holding period (usually 14 days) to guarantee no refunds.
instructionsFaq2Answer: Withdrawal is available in the "Payouts" section. The minimum withdrawal amount is $100. We support transfers to bank cards and USDT.
instructionsFaq3Question: What to do if a client clicked the link but didn't register?
instructionsFaq3Answer: We use cookies that are stored for 30 days. If the client returns and registers within this time, they will be assigned to you.
instructionsFaq4Question: Can I work in multiple countries?
instructionsFaq4Answer: Yes, Gridix works globally. You can attract developers and agencies from any countries where construction is taking place.
instructionsFaq5Question: What to do if a client came directly, but I referred them first?
instructionsFaq5Answer: Contact our support on Telegram. If you can confirm the fact of first contact (screenshots of correspondence, sending a presentation), we will manually assign the client to you.
calculatorSubtitle: Find out how much you can earn by choosing the number of projects per year
calculatorNote: All calculations are based on the average cost of an annual Gridix subscription — ${amount}. Your income grows with each active client. Integrators independently accept payment from clients.
